$comment: Curated overrides for resolving schedule artists to Spotify artists. Artists not listed resolve by plain name search.

amble.note: Multiple artists named Amble on Spotify; this ID is the Irish folk trio (~940K monthly listeners, album 'Reverie').

belle-blue.note: Emerging Brooklyn teen singer-songwriter; ID pinned to avoid partial-name matches (Belle, Belles, Katie Belle Blue).

brandon-flowers.note: Product rule: resolve The Killers frontman to the band's catalog rather than his solo page.

case-oats.note: Chicago alt-country band ('Last Missouri Exit'); ID verified from open.spotify.com.

clover-county.note: Athens, GA americana/alt-country act (~87K monthly listeners); ID verified.

community-chapstick.note: Real band (Donavan Burt, Disko, Ebbi) but no verifiable Spotify artist page; releases are distributed as downloads on communitychapstick.com.

dove-ellis.note: Irish chamber-folk artist (Thomas O'Donoghue, debut album 'Blizzard'); ID verified.

for-petes-sake.note: Communal singalong slot in the spirit of Pete Seeger; Pete Seeger's catalog is the right playlist content.

gillian-welch-david-rawlings.note: Their only 2026 set is 'Play Grateful Dead', so blend both duo members with Grateful Dead.

heynderickx-garcia-conover.note: Collaborative billing; blend both artists (they also share a joint album, 'Among Horses III').

honest-charlie.note: Tiny catalog (~76 monthly listeners, songs 'Little Somethin'', 'Good Ol' Days'); only 'Honest Charlie' artist found on Spotify but identity match with the Newport act is unconfirmed.

hudson-freeman.note: Brooklyn lofi-folk artist (album 'is a Folk Artist'); ID verified.

jackie-evans.note: NYC pop/soul/folk singer-songwriter (EP 'Most of the Time', touring with Jensen McRae); common name, ID pinned.

jonathan-bernstein.note: Rolling Stone music journalist; Foundation Stage talk, no music catalog.

jordan-klepper.note: Comedian ('The Daily Show'), no music catalog.

kirby.note: Highly ambiguous name (video-game soundtracks etc.); this is soul singer KIRBY (Kirby Lauryen Dockery), ID verified.

lily-fitts.note: Massachusetts indie-folk songwriter (debut 'Getting By'); ID verified.

mark-cutler.note: Providence, RI roots-rock veteran (The Schemers, Raindogs); common name, ID pinned.

matt-quinn.note: Product rule: Mt. Joy's lead singer; plain 'Matt Quinn' search would miss the band catalog.

met-lab-students.note: Festival education-program student showcase; no Spotify catalog.

morgan-nagler.note: Solo catalog is small; blend with her band Whispertown for a fuller playlist.

music-lab-students.note: Festival education-program student showcase; no Spotify catalog.

nabeel.note: Iraqi-American indie/shoegaze project of Yasir Razak (Richmond, VA; single 'lazim alshams'); plain 'Nabeel' hits unrelated Pakistani/Arabic pop singers, so query includes the Arabic name.

open-mic.note: Daily Bike Stage open-mic slot; not a resolvable artist.

princess-june.note: Harmony trio (Myah Strauser, Griffin Keeffe, Telli Quinn); ID pinned to avoid Princess/June partial matches.

rowan-grisman-hull-campbell-williams.displayName: Peter Rowan / Sam Grisman / Sierra Hull / Larry Campbell & Teresa Williams
rowan-grisman-hull-campbell-williams.note: Bluegrass summit billing; blend all four acts. Sam Grisman records as 'Sam Grisman Project' (ID verified).

ryan-davis-roadhouse-band.note: Plain 'Ryan Davis' is ambiguous on Spotify; canonical artist is 'Ryan Davis & the Roadhouse Band' (ID verified).

sally-rose.note: UNVERIFIED: several artists named Sally Rose on Spotify (Virginia country-queer songwriter, The Sally Rose Band from MA, a Florida artist) and no press confirms which plays Newport; needs manual review before pinning an ID.

sea-to-shining-sea.note: Newport Folk Presents storytelling project by Jay Sweet featuring Devon Gilfillian; his catalog is the closest playlist match for this special set.

shannon-narducy-rem.displayName: Michael Shannon & Jason Narducy and Friends Play R.E.M.
shannon-narducy-rem.note: Tribute set performing R.E.M. albums; the right playlist content is R.E.M. (product rule).

snacktime.note: Philadelphia brass/funk band, stylized SNACKTIME; ID pinned to avoid kids-music and 'Snack Time' collisions.

stephen-covell.note: Veteran songwriter via Operation Encore (albums incl. 'Longing for the Hills'); name appears unique but Spotify presence is sparse/unconfirmed — low confidence.

wednesday.note: Common word/name on Spotify; this ID is the Asheville band ('Rat Saw God', 'Bleeds'), verified.

williams-tyler.note: Duo billing; blend both instrumental guitarists. The fingerstyle guitarist is the top 'William Tyler' on Spotify.
